MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. JASON LUNDBERG OF THE LADVA LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 296-8844 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOSE A. CORDOVA APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT UNCLE VITOS PIZZA, LLC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is GRANTED. Defendant must pay $200 to plaintiff's counsel by September 30, 2009 to compensate plaintiff for the reasonable time incurred by plaintiff due to defendant's neglect. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (301/HEK)
